title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 92.340 - Refund or absorption of tax, prohibited
text:
92.340.  Refund or absorption of tax, prohibited. — It is unlawful for any person to advertise or hold out or state to the public or to any transient guest or food establishment patron directly or indirectly, that the tax or any part thereof imposed by sections 92.325 to 92.340, and required to be collected by that person, will be absorbed by that person, or anyone on behalf of that person, or that it will not be separately stated and added to the price of the sleeping room or food establishment bill, or if added, that it or any part thereof will be refunded.
(L. 1989 S.B. 295 & 312 § 14)
